deep_dive.title: VSANet: View-aware Sparse Attention Network for Light Field Image Denoising
deep_dive.abstract: Light field (LF) image denoising is challenging due to the high-dimensional structure of LF data. While noise is independent across sub-aperture images, scene content exhibits strong cross-view correlations. We introduce VSANet, a view-aware sparse attention network for LF denoising. Specifically, we propose a view-aware sparse attention (VSA) block that represents the 4D LF feature map as a unified spatial-angular token space and performs cross-view aggregation via locality-sensitive hashing-based sparse attention. This enables global feature interactions with linear complexity, effectively exploiting LF correlations across views and spatial locations. In addition, we design a feature refinement (FR) block to emphasize informative features in spatial, angular, and epipolar subspaces. The VSA and FR blocks are integrated within a sequential attention refinement module, forming the core of VSANet. Experiments demonstrate VSANet outperforms stateof-the-art LF denoising methods.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: light field image denoising using view-aware sparse attention network
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 利用视角感知稀疏注意力网络进行光场图像去噪
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 利用视角感知稀疏注意力网络进行光场图像去噪
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 利用视角感知稀疏注意力网络进行光场图像去噪
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes VSANet with view-aware sparse attention and feature refinement for LF denoising, leveraging cross-view correlations via hashing-based attention.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对光场图像高维结构去噪难题，提出VSANet，利用视角感知稀疏注意力（VSA）将4D特征映射为统一空间-角度标记空间，通过局部敏感哈希稀疏注意力实现全局交叉视图聚合，并设计特征精炼块增强有用特征。方法与高光谱图像的空间-光谱去噪高度相似，可迁移至高光谱领域。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对光场图像高维结构去噪难题，提出VSANet，利用视角感知稀疏注意力（VSA）将4D特征映射为统一空间-角度标记空间，通过局部敏感哈希稀疏注意力实现全局交叉视图聚合，并设计特征精炼块增强有用特征。方法与高光谱图像的空间-光谱去噪高度相似，可迁移至高光谱领域。

quick_skim.title: BiDeMem: Bidirectional Degradation Memory for Explainable Image Restoration
quick_skim.abstract: Degradation-aware prompts, conditions, and latent priors are increasingly used in image restoration, yet they are usually judged by a single endpoint: whether the restored image obtains higher PSNR. This is a weak test of semantics. A condition can help by adding capacity, acting as a global correction bias, or exploiting dataset shortcuts, without becoming an interpretable degradation prior. We propose BiDeMem, a bidirectional degradation memory for explainable image restoration. A query built from restoration features and input statistics retrieves a compact top-k subset of memory slots. The same selected slot identity supports the restoration path at inference time and a training-only forward-degradation explanation path. The study centers on verifiability in a controlled multi-degradation NAFNet setting. New controls separate the gain from a correction head alone, a dense query prior, and a static global prior: these variants are 0.2588, 0.2586, and 0.2839 dB below BiRank, respectively. Strong residual supervision and a wider degradation head also remain below the full bidirectional memory model. Intervention probes show that BiRank preserves restoration quality while increasing wrong-prior and native-prior sensitivity, framing degradation memory as both a restoration module and a falsifiable explanation mechanism.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: explainable image restoration with degradation memory
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 具有退化记忆的可解释图像恢复方法
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 具有退化记忆的可解释图像恢复方法
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 具有退化记忆的可解释图像恢复方法
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: BiDeMem proposes a bidirectional degradation memory that retrieves compact slot identities to support both restoration and explanation, improving interpretability.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对现有图像恢复方法缺乏可解释退化先验的问题，本文提出双向退化记忆（BiDeMem）。该方法从恢复特征和输入统计量构建查询，检索紧凑的 top-k 记忆槽，同一槽位同时支持恢复路径和解释路径。实验表明，BiDeMem 在恢复质量上不逊于现有方法，同时提供了可解释的退化分析。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对现有图像恢复方法缺乏可解释退化先验的问题，本文提出双向退化记忆（BiDeMem）。该方法从恢复特征和输入统计量构建查询，检索紧凑的 top-k 记忆槽，同一槽位同时支持恢复路径和解释路径。实验表明，BiDeMem 在恢复质量上不逊于现有方法，同时提供了可解释的退化分析。

quick_skim.title: NullFlow: One-Step Generative Reconstruction
quick_skim.abstract: We propose NullFlow, a principled framework for one-step generative image reconstruction. Our key idea is to confine the generative flow to a measurement-consistent subspace. Because the flow never leaves this subspace, NullFlow needs no separate data-fidelity corrections, unlike existing solvers. NullFlow samples in a single network evaluation by learning the flow's average velocity, avoiding the step-by-step integration of traditional flow matching methods. We prove that the average velocity of this constrained flow yields a training objective whose global minimizer is a one-step posterior sampler. We show on image inpainting that NullFlow matches state-of-the-art diffusion solvers while cutting inference from hundreds of network evaluations to one.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: one-step generative image reconstruction for recovery tasks
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 一步生成式图像重建用于恢复任务
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 一步生成式图像重建用于恢复任务
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 一步生成式图像重建用于恢复任务
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes NullFlow for one-step generative reconstruction, achieving state-of-the-art inpainting with a single network evaluation by constraining flow to measurement subspace.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对扩散模型迭代采样计算成本高的问题，提出NullFlow，将生成流约束在测量一致子空间中，学习平均速度实现一步采样。在图像修复上达到与扩散模型相当的性能，而推理仅需一次网络评估。该方法通用性强，可推广至图像去噪和恢复任务，但未涉及高光谱具体场景。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对扩散模型迭代采样计算成本高的问题，提出NullFlow，将生成流约束在测量一致子空间中，学习平均速度实现一步采样。在图像修复上达到与扩散模型相当的性能，而推理仅需一次网络评估。该方法通用性强，可推广至图像去噪和恢复任务，但未涉及高光谱具体场景。
